description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house surrounded by several lush trees with dense green and purple foliage. The house features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist white and wood-paneled exterior. The front facade includes a prominent entry door and a balcony with a glass railing above. The landscaping is naturalistic, with trees closely encircling the structure, providing privacy and shade. The rear of the house has additional large windows and a small outdoor seating area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open views, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows and a minimalist white and wood exterior, surrounded by dense green and purple trees.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof, balcony, and dense arrangement of trees encircling the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry door, balcony with glass railing, and trees framing the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a small outdoor seating area, and trees closely surrounding the back of the house.
description_view_3: Side view showing the flat roof, wood paneling, and the dense tree coverage around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with no porch, flush entry, and a balcony above with a glass railing
